tools_additions.tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 UI Native View Creator
tools_additions.notes: Playwright UI automation draft for Airtable native grid view creation. Dry-run default. Execution requires ConfirmToken CREATE_WBS09_NATIVE_VIEWS and second interactive confirmation. Filters/sorts are not configured automatically in this draft.

environment_contract_additions.notes: Use Local Configuration Registry names only. Do not store local path values or secrets in catalog, logs, or Airtable.
